query: SK Hynix ADR Nasdaq listing SKHY first trading date July 2026 latest news, pricing date, roadshow status, SEC review as of late June 2026. Is July 10 still the expected trading date? Any reports of delay or schedule slippage?
answer:
**Summary:** The research question is resolved by actual events. **SK Hynix listed on the Nasdaq exactly on schedule — trading began July 10, 2026, with no delay or schedule slippage.** July 10 was not just "still expected" as of late June; the listing actually happened on that date.

Key facts:
- **Pricing:** Priced at **$149/ADR on Thursday, July 9, 2026** (revised down from the earlier ~$166 target), raising **$26.5 billion** via 177.9 million ADRs — the largest US share sale ever by a foreign company.
- **Debut:** Began trading **July 10, 2026** on Nasdaq Global Select Market under temporary "when-issued" ticker **SKHYV**; opened ~$170, closed at **$168.01 (+13%)**.
- **Ticker change:** Switches to **SKHY** on regular-way basis **July 13, 2026** (per official Nasdaq Trader notice DTN 2026-11); settlement July 14.
- **Roadshow/SEC:** Book was **>7x oversubscribed**; SEC F-1/A processed and the deal priced/closed normally — no reports of SEC-related delay.
- **Only change vs. late-June plan:** A downward revision in size/price ($29.4B/$166 → $26.5B/$149), not a schedule change.

sources.title: South Korea's biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
sources.snippet: SK Hynix said it expects to start trading on July 10, but added that the dates were tentative and subject to change.

sources.title: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'
sources.snippet: SK Hynix rose 13% in its first day of trading on Nasdaq, closing at $168.01. The stock is trading under the ticker symbol SKHYV, and will switch to SKHY as of Tuesday.

sources.title: REMINDER: SK hynix Inc. Initial Public Offering on Nasdaq Global Select Market
sources.snippet: SK hynix has listed and began trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market on July 10, 2026, on a when-issued basis with the symbol SKHYV. The symbol will change to SKHY and begin trading on a regular way basis effective July 13, 2026.

sources.title: SK Hynix Raises $26.5 Billion in Biggest Foreign Debut in US
sources.snippet: SK Hynix priced its US share offering at $149 apiece, raising $26.5 billion.

sources.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq ADR offering more than 7 times oversubscribed
sources.snippet: SK Hynix's planned U.S. listing has attracted orders exceeding seven times the number of available shares.

sources.title: SK Hynix Could Reportedly Price US Offering at $149 Per ADR
sources.snippet: Slightly lower than the previously reported estimate of $29.4 billion, wherein the ADRs were expected to be priced at $166 each. Final price set Thursday, trading Friday.

sources.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq debut: $26.5 billion ADR listing sets record
sources.snippet: Priced at $149 apiece on Thursday, the offering comprised 177.9 million ADRs, with every ten ADRs corresponding to a single underlying common share.

sources.title: SK Hynix (SKHY) US$26.5bn Nasdaq Listing: Buy or Wait?
sources.snippet: SK Hynix began trading on Friday 10 July, opening at US$170, up about 14% from its US$149 offer price (under the temporary ticker SKHYV, moving to SKHY on 13 July).
